reasoning: 17 consecutive weeks at #1 on the Billboard 200 is an extremely rare feat that has not been accomplished in the 21st century (the contemporary record is 15 consecutive weeks by Morgan Wallen's 'One Thing at a Time' and 13 weeks by Drake's 'Views').
